prompt: A centered close-up 3D stylized portrait of a young man against a smooth vivid crimson-red studio background, rendered like a polished animated character with realistic lighting and soft subsurface skin shading. He has thick glossy black hair styled in a neat side-parted pompadour with sculpted waves, visible ears, and thin gold round eyeglass frames peeking out at the sides. Show only the head and a little of the upper shoulders, cropped tightly so the hairstyle fills the top of the frame. The character wears a dark top barely visible at the bottom edge. Use a symmetrical front-facing composition, ultra-clean background, high contrast, soft rim lighting, and premium 3D illustration quality similar to a modern animated profile avatar. The face should be fully visible and detailed, with a neutral expression, but keep the overall design minimal and iconic.
